title: Recognise fauna
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Recognise fauna demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for fauna recognition

pcs.text: Identify and select processes for fauna recognition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select processes for fauna recognition?

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, notify supervisor and follow workplace health and safety procedures.
